# Blue Hub

> AI agent tools for Base builders — analysis, audits, and signals via 3-agent
> consensus (Blue · Aeon · MiroShark). Pay per call in USDC over the x402
> protocol. No API key, no signup, no subscription.

Blue Hub exposes 34 paid tools. Any x402-capable agent can call a tool's
endpoint directly and pay per request in USDC on Base (chain id 8453). When a
request arrives without payment, the endpoint returns HTTP 402 with payment
requirements; the agent signs an EIP-3009 authorization and retries with an
X-Payment header. Settlement is on-chain via the Coinbase CDP facilitator.

## Discovery
- Machine-readable catalog (all tools, endpoints, prices, input schemas): https://blueagent.dev/api/catalog
- MCP server (remote, no install): https://blueagent.dev/api/mcp
- Human UI: https://blueagent.dev/hub

## Payment
- Protocol: x402 (version 2)
- Network: eip155:8453 (Base mainnet)
- Asset: USDC (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913)
- Endpoints: https://blueagent.dev/api/x402/{tool-id}  (POST)

## Examples
- Ecosystem digest: https://blueagent.dev/api/x402/ecosystem-digest
- Token pick signal: https://blueagent.dev/api/x402/token-pick-signal
- Market-fit validator: https://blueagent.dev/api/x402/market-fit

See https://blueagent.dev/api/catalog for the full list with prices and inputs.
